hero.title: Yogesh Samsi Online Tabla Academy
hero.description: The ultimate online tabla syllabus that integrates the depth of the guru-shishya tradition with a modern, goal-oriented approach distilling Yogesh Samsi's lifetime steeped in Hindustani Classical Music.
hero.heroImageAlt: Yogesh Samsi standing holding and playing a tabla.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
paragraphs: In his formative years, his gurus Pt. Dinkar Kaikini and Ustad Alla Rakha instilled in him the importance of sharing his knowledge, wisdom and expertise. From teaching at the Ustad Alla Rakha Institute, assisting Ustadji himself, to conducting masterclasses and workshops worldwide, he has trained both hobbyists and professionals with unwavering charisma for over 40 years now.

Teaching is second nature to him, and his students perform in venues both large and small across the globe. This endeavour unites his deep-rooted values with a lifetime of dedication, aiming to inspire you to become the next torchbearer of this rich lineage and tradition.

Now in his 50’s, Yogesh Samsi effortlessly navigates any musical setting and this is the experience he wants to share with you here. The goal of this endeavour is to instill foundational skills and develop a holistic outlook towards the subject of  Tabla.

Yogesh Ji has personally designed not only a syllabus but also instilled his unique style of teaching within his senior students. After spending his entire life perfecting his craft and learning in an un institutionalised form, it has been his dream and he has spent his entire life carving out a method that brings together the essence of the Guru shishya style of teaching and combines them with modern day goal oriented quick learning which is specially meant to cater the modern day disciple.
